summary.lv: Arvato Systems Latvia meklē SOC Analyst, kurš nodrošinās reāllaika drošības uzraudzību un incidentu noteikšanu ar SIEM un citiem drošības rīkiem. Hibrīds darbs Rīgā, atalgojums €2000–3700 mēnesī.
summary.en: Arvato Systems Latvia is seeking a SOC Analyst to perform real-time security monitoring and incident response using SIEM and other security tools in a hybrid role in Riga, offering €2,000–3,700/month.
